concerns.text: No verified developer productivity datasets exist in the verified datasets block. The methodology (ANOVA, effect sizes, confounding control) cannot be executed without data containing tool_usage, task_time, defect_rate, experience_years, and confounders. This blocks methodology validation.

Power analysis is deferred to implementation phase. For ANOVA with interaction terms, minimum detectable effect size and required sample size per stratum should be specified before execution to ensure adequate power (Constitution Principle VI).

Confounding control depends on confounders being available in the dataset. The methodology should specify fallback handling (e.g., propensity score matching, instrumental variables) when key confounders are missing, not just flagging limitations.
